title: [FIRRTL] infer width (tail)
body:
The following FIRRTL program:

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp20: UInt<12>
    tmp20 <= tail(SInt(-1537), 0)
```

Compiled with `firtool a_top_mod.fir --lower-to-hw --lower-types --expand-whens --infer-widths --lowering-options=noAlwaysFF --verilog -o=a_top_mod_new.v` fails with the following error:

```
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: error: destination width 12 is not greater than or equal to source width 16
    tmp20 <= tail(SInt(-1537), 0)
          ^
a_top_mod.fir:4:11: note: see current operation: "firrtl.connect"(%tmp20, %0) : (!firrtl.uint<12>, !firrtl.uint<16>) -> ()
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output [11:0] tmp20
);
  assign tmp20 = 12'h9ff;
endmodule
```
